title: How Senior Engineers Actually Build With AI in 2026 | Build a Full Stack Systems Architecture App
summary: A tutorial showing how to build a production-ready SaaS application using AI agents and code generation with an architecture-first workflow. The project uses Next.js, Prisma, Postgres, TypeScript, and Tailwind, integrating tools like Clerk for authentication, Trigger.dev for workflows, Liveblocks for collaboration, and CodeRabbit for code review.
